method_summary: Analyzed 1,178 safety and reliability papers from 9,439 generative AI papers written by 5 AI companies and 6 universities using OpenAI's o3-mini for classification and regex keyword searches for high-risk domains
key_innovation: First comprehensive analysis quantifying the concentration of AI governance research within corporate entities and identifying post-deployment research gaps
baselines_compared: Corporate AI vs Academic AI research impact

key_results.citation_concentration: Google DeepMind has more citations than top 4 academic institutions combined

best_result: AI governance research is highly concentrated within a handful of uniquely resourced and integrated AI tech companies
title: Real-World Gaps in AI Governance Research
